_comment: Add these to your Claude Desktop config to drive Fund402 (and Clawback) from chat. On macOS the real file is ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json — merge the mcpServers below into it, replace the absolute paths with yours, then fully quit (Cmd+Q) and reopen Claude Desktop. No secrets go here: each server reads its own .env module-relatively (fund402-mcp uses fund402-agent/.env; clawback-mcp uses clawback-agent/.env), so make sure those exist with CSPR_CLOUD_API_KEY + GROQ_API_KEY. Use an absolute node path (e.g. /opt/homebrew/bin/node) if `node` isn't on Claude Desktop's PATH.
